india_trends.title: Meta preparing to unwind $2.5 billion Manus acquisition, let co-founders go after China ban: Report
india_trends.summary: Meta plans to reverse its $2.5 billion acquisition of AI startup Manus after China banned the transaction for national security reasons.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Gold, silver prices today: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver on 28 April in Delhi, Mumbai, Pune, others
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices today slipped on MCX, as gold corrected 0.12% to ₹1,51,493 per 10 grams, while silver slipped 0.96% amid global volatility, a rising dollar, crude prices &amp; West Asia geopolitical tensions. The near-term outlook across domestic &amp; global markets remains volatile.

india_trends.title: Canara Bank, PNB to Bank of Baroda: Why are PSU bank shares nosediving?
india_trends.summary: The Nifty PSU Bank index fell nearly 2%, with all its constituents trading in the red. Bank of India, Union Bank of India, Punjab &amp; Sind Bank and Canara Bank were the top index losers, falling more than 2% each.

india_trends.title: Rupee slips to 94.47 per dollar with oil-sensitive Asia FX, state-run banks' dollar sales cushion
india_trends.summary: The Indian rupee weakened against the dollar on Tuesday, falling to 94.47 as rising oil prices and stalled energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz due to the U.S.-Iran conflict weighed on sentiment. Traders anticipate continued pressure on the rupee until energy supply disruptions ease, while the

india_trends.title: City Union Bank shares gain 6% as Q4 profit rises 25% to Rs 360 crore
india_trends.summary: Shares of City Union Bank surged nearly 6% on Tuesday after reporting a 25% YoY rise in Q4FY26 net profit to Rs 360 crore, driven by strong NII growth and improved margins. Robust deposit and advance growth, along with stable asset quality and capital position, supported investor sentiment.

india_trends.title: Adani Total Gas shares surge 8% to seven-month high after Q4 results, dividend announcement
india_trends.summary: Adani Total Gas shares saw a significant jump following strong financial results. The company reported a 9% rise in net profit for the January-March quarter of FY26. Revenue also grew by 17% year-on-year. This positive performance, driven by higher volumes, led to an 8% surge in the company's stock

india_trends.title: PSU bank stocks fall up to 3%. How RBI’s ECL directions can impact lenders
india_trends.summary: PSU bank stocks fell up to 3% on Tuesday after RBI confirmed the rollout of the Expected Credit Loss (ECL) framework from April 2027, triggering concerns over higher provisioning and capital impact. Brokerages warn of a potential 5–10% hit to net worth, though phased implementation may soften the im

india_trends.title: Broader markets rally! These smallcap stocks jumped up to 57% in April so far. Do you own any?
india_trends.summary: Broader markets are experiencing a significant rally in April, with smallcap stocks outperforming benchmarks. Several smallcap companies, including Ola Electric, Gallantt Ispat, and Welspun Corp, have seen substantial gains of up to 57% this month, recovering from the March selloff.
